rules.rule_text:
rule mal_NarniaRAT
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects NarniaRAT from BotnetFenix campaign"
		date = "2/2/2024"
		hash = "43f6c3f92a025d12de4c4f14afa5d098"

	strings:
		$s1 = "client-remote desktop"
		$s2 = "SendDataToServer"
		$s3 = "SendRunningApps"
		$s4 = "SendDataToServer"
		$s5 = "SendKeys"
		$s6 = "_CorExeMain"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and 5 of them
}
